title: Learn how to successfully design hospital logistics robots at the Robotics Summit
title_zh: Learn how to successfully design hospital logistics robots at the Robotics Summit
abstract:
Experts from Rovex Technologies, SKA Robotics, and ST Engineering Aethon will discuss design considerations for hospital robotics. 
 The post  Learn how to successfully design hospital logistics robots at the Robotics Summit  appeared first on  The Robot Report .
abstract_zh: Experts from Rovex Technologies, SKA Robotics, and ST Engineering Aethon will discuss design considerations for hospital robotics. The post Learn how to successfully design hospital logistics robots at the Robotics Summit appeared first on The Robot Report .
tldr_zh: Experts from Rovex Technologies, SKA Robotics, and ST Engine
cover_zh: Experts from Rovex Technologies, SKA Robotics, and ST Engine
